billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your plan, upgrades/downgrades and real subscription status.
billing.stripeDisabled: Stripe is disabled by environment configuration. Subscription and checkout actions are not available.
billing.pricingSubtitle: Start free and scale when you need to. No surprises
billing.ctaSubtitle: Start today with the Free plan — no card, no expiration date

subscription.title: Current subscription
subscription.stripeDisabledDesc: Paid billing is temporarily disabled. You can continue using the product, but checkouts and subscription changes are unavailable until Stripe is re-enabled.
subscription.willDowngrade: Will downgrade to Free at cycle end
subscription.downgradeDateNote: Your current plan will remain active until {date}. After that you will automatically switch to Free.
subscription.freePlanDesc: Your account is on the {plan} plan. The subscription endpoint returned 404 (no paid subscription).
subscription.noSubscriptionDesc: Your account is on the {plan} plan. You have no registered paid subscription.
subscription.noSubscriptionYet: No subscription has been registered for your account yet.

active.label: Active
active.description: Your subscription is up to date.

trialing.label: Trialing
trialing.description: Your subscription is in the trial period.

past_due.label: Past due
past_due.description: Your subscription is still active, but there is a pending payment.

incomplete.label: Incomplete
incomplete.description: The initial charge did not complete correctly.

unpaid.label: Unpaid
unpaid.description: The subscription could not be charged.

errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to access billing.
errors.subscriptionForbidden: You don't have permission to access this subscription.

free.description: Free plan to start with basic project control. No OCR, no partners, and no advanced automations.
free.l2: Up to 50 expenses per month per project

basic.description: Plan for freelancers and small teams with real collaboration, partners/splits, and monthly OCR included.

premium.description: Unlimited premium plan with Aria, unlimited OCR, advanced reports, and API access for financial automation.

enterprise.description: Enterprise plan for large teams: unlimited limits and advanced collaboration and control capabilities.

default.description: Subscription plan to manage your finances in an organized way.

cancelPage.title: Payment cancelled
cancelPage.subtitle: Subscription not completed
cancelPage.description: You cancelled the Stripe process. No charge was made.
cancelPage.hint: You can try again anytime from the billing section.

successPage.syncedDescription: Your plan is updated and ready to use.
successPage.processingDescription: The webhook may take a few more seconds. Retry to check again.
